name: canshare-tnm-gi-colorectal-pt
title: NZ AJCC gastrointestinal colon and/or rectum pathological T category
description: A pathological tumour stage (pT) of a gastrointestional colon and/or rectum tumour before initiation of treatment, using the AJCC cancer staging manual (latest edition).
